title: Luna Change Ledger Record
description: One row per Luna-driven change. Append-only. Phase 5C foundation; not yet wired into runtime services. The runtime ledger lives at memory/luna_change_ledger.jsonl and is gitignored.

schema_version.description: Bump only on backwards-incompatible record-shape changes.

ts.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone offset.

actor.description: Who/what produced this change (luna_cu, aider_bridge, luna_self_repair, operator, claude, ...).

target_files.description: Project-relative POSIX paths normalized via normalize_target_file().

plan_id.description: Optional pointer to a Phase 5G+ planned-change ledger row.

diff_hash.description: SHA-256 of the diff text or whole-file content.

diff_path.description: Path to a stored diff (logic_updates/<plan_id>/diff.patch or similar).

verification.description: Captured verification outcomes. secret_scan defaults to 'not_run' until a secrets scanner exists.

rollback_path.description: Filesystem path to the .bak / backup folder used for rollback.

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash if this change was committed.
